generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mom and small business owner, I've always believed in strong domestic security. The recent attacks show we need to give our agencies the tools they need to keep us safe. Some worry about civil liberties, but we've seen how delays in intelligence sharing can cost lives. We can't afford to wait until it's too late again. #SecurityFirst #ProtectOurFamilies
